hero.name: Germán Sandoval
hero.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I build scalable web applications with clean code and thoughtful UX.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I'm a passionate software engineer with experience building modern web applications. I love clean architecture, great developer experience, and shipping products people enjoy.
about.bio2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring learning languages with Duolingo, watching series, reading books, taking photos or experimenting with side projects.
about.status: Open to new opportunities and relocation

bullets: Contributed to a platform processing more than 50K daily payment transactions through integrations with 10+ banking and payment partners.
Selected and defined the frontend technology stack, architecture patterns, and engineering standards for a greenfield international payments SDK supporting 15+ currencies and 8+ payment methods.

Designed and implemented the communication contract between host applications and the SDK using window-based event messaging, enabling seamless integration across multiple banking partners and products.
Established frontend engineering standards, including state management, data-fetching patterns, loading strategies, and application architecture guidelines to improve scalability and maintainability.
Led architecture and implementation efforts across three concurrent product initiatives, coordinating work between frontend, backend, and product stakeholders while mentoring engineers.

boattrader.name: BoatTrader
boattrader.description: Contributed to a 15% increase in organic traffic by improving Core Web Vitals and reducing page load times.

synchrony.name: Synchrony
synchrony.description: Led frontend performance initiatives, refactoring state management, and optimizing GraphQL data-fetching strategies.

tono.name: TonoHealth
tono.description: Implemented video consultations, real-time messaging, authentication flows, and Stripe payment processing.

gm.name: General Motors
gm.description: Implemented message-driven workflows and asynchronous communication patterns to process vehicle usage events and trigger personalized customer engagement campaigns.

bullets: Led a team of 5 engineers delivering developer platform initiatives and internal tooling improvements for Expedia Group.
Integrated Spotify Backstage into Expedia's engineering ecosystem, improving service discovery and developer experience.
Conducted technical interviews and contributed to frontend engineering hiring decisions.

Designed and implemented event-driven payment-processing microservices on AWS Lambda using RabbitMQ messaging patterns, supporting 200K+ daily transactions across a customer base exceeding 500K users.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve reliability, observability, and operational scalability of payment infrastructure.
Contributed to backend architecture discussions and cloud-native service design initiatives.
Led the design and adoption of a shared React component library containing 50+ reusable components used across multiple Expedia Group teams.
Reduced frontend development effort by approximately 40% through standardization and component reuse.
Migrated 80+ legacy Handlebars views to React applications, reducing Time to Interactive by 55%.
Reduced database query execution times from 3 minutes to 30 seconds through indexing and query optimization.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.me_description: My personal portfolio and blog. Built with Next.js App Router, next-intl for multilingual support (EN/ES), Tailwind CSS v4, and framer-motion animations. Features dark mode, MDX blog, dynamic OG images, and RSS feed.

cashbackCalculator.title: Calculate your real benefit
cashbackCalculator.warehouseHelp: Optional: estimate for in-store purchases in Mexico. Does not count toward the card’s monthly cashback cap. Terms may vary; figure is indicative.
cashbackCalculator.monthlyCapHelp: 0 = no cap. Applies to total card cashback, not per category.
cashbackCalculator.annualFeeHelp: Net benefit subtracts the fee including VAT ({rate}%).
cashbackCalculator.netBenefit: Net benefit (cashback − annual fee with VAT):
cashbackCalculator.warehouseAnnualSavings: Estimated annual effective savings (2.3% on MX warehouse):
cashbackCalculator.totalDisclaimer: The total combines card return and price savings; it is not a single type of points or cashback.
